name: Set of 2 24" Wood with Metal Base Counter Stool with Footrest Natural - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring modern sophistication to your kitchen or home bar with this 2-Pack Wood with Metal Base Counter Stool from Room Essentials™. Built from solid metal for better stability, these counter stools feature a wooden seat and back to keep you comfortable with your morning coffee or evening snack. Best of all, the wooden counter stools are designed with built-in footrests for added convenience.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Overall height: 34"
Overall depth: 19.5"
Overall width: 18.5"
Seat depth: 15.75"
Seat width: 15.5"
Seat height: 24"
Back width:15.35"
Back height:5.5"
Floor to the foot rest:6.5"
